headline: A premium Georgia camp brand built around trust, experience, and clarity
subheadline: Camp Dream GA exists to help families and organizers discover camp experiences that feel memorable, well-planned, and worth the investment.

sections.title: Why the site was rebuilt
sections.description: The public experience needed to feel more trustworthy, easier to navigate, and better aligned with how real families and groups make decisions.

sections.title: How the business works
sections.description: The site combines direct program purchases, inquiry-first premium planning, and content-led search growth into one coherent brand system.

sections.title: What makes the experience better
sections.description: Original content, cleaner structure, legal trust pages, and premium design all work together to make decision-making feel calmer and more confident.

faq.question: Is Camp Dream GA only a content site?
faq.answer: No. It is both a public-facing program and planning site and a content property designed for long-term organic growth.

cta.heading: See the programs, pricing, and planning resources that now shape the public experience.
cta.body: The strongest first impression comes from a site that looks complete, answers real questions, and makes the next step obvious.
